name: recoil_app_load_zbd_and_start_engine
description: RecoilApp::LoadZbdAndStartEngine conditionally mounts zrdr.zbd, starts the engine and queues startup state, registers HUD mission section handlers, and returns one.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /DUINT_PTR=UINT /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?LoadZbdAndStartEngine@RecoilApp@@QAEHXZ at 0x42e490 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 24 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 51 bytes and the VC object symbol is 64 bytes with 13 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smoke validates the no-mission-zbd branch, engine startup hwnd handoff, queued startup state, skip/reserved flags, and Mission/MissionLate section registration.
